expectations.text: GSC or Ahrefs data is pulled for the specified domain (or its associated content site)
expectations.evidence: samdunning.org has DR 0.0. Agent redirected to breakingb2b.com. GSC authenticated to risevision.com. Used Ahrefs for breakingb2b.com.

expectations.text: Focus is on positions 10-20 as requested
expectations.evidence: All 5 opportunities are in positions 13–22. Explicitly addresses 'position 10-20 stuff'.

expectations.text: Opportunities specify what type of content to build
expectations.evidence: 'standalone guide', 'A listicle', 'separate page', 'rebuild the consolidated page', 'clean roundup'.

expectations.text: SERP format evidence is included (what currently ranks at #1)
expectations.evidence: Opp 1: 'SERP for b2b seo is entirely dominated by comprehensive guides: Semrush (DR 92), Backlinko (DR 90)'. Opp 5: 'A DR 33 site is ranking at position 5'.

expectations.text: Each opportunity has a suggested working title or slug
expectations.evidence: All opportunities have suggested slugs and titles.

expectations.text: Supporting keyword cluster is identified for each opportunity
expectations.evidence: No supporting keyword clusters listed for any opportunity. Primary keyword only.

expectations.text: A clear distinction is made between 'new page needed' vs 'update existing page'
expectations.evidence: Opp 4 (cannibalization): 'consolidation + upgrade, not a new page'. Others clearly new pages.
